summary: Completed comprehensive testing of preorder and complete-all features. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows working correctly - login, orders page with 3 tabs (Заказы, Предзаказы, Вызовы), complete-all dialog, and client menu preorder form.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - returns valid JWT token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials - returns 401
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/orders/complete-all - completes all active orders
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/orders/complete-all without auth - returns 401
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/staff-calls/complete-all - completes all active calls
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/staff-calls/complete-all without auth - returns 401
Backend: Preorder table exists with is_preorder=true (code 6E32830E)
Backend: Regular table exists (code 697DCAA5)
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/{preorder_table_code} - returns is_preorder=true in table
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/{regular_table_code} - returns is_preorder=false/null
Backend: POST /api/public/orders with preorder table - saves customer info
Backend: POST /api/public/orders with regular table - does NOT save customer info
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/orders - returns orders with is_preorder flag
Backend: Preorder from 'Иван Петров' exists with customer details
Backend: Cleanup test orders completed
Frontend: Login with admin/220066 - dashboard loads
Frontend: Navigate to Заказы page - shows 3 tabs (Заказы, Предзаказы, Вызовы)
Frontend: Orders tab shows 'Завершить все' button when active orders exist
Frontend: Preorders tab shows preorders with customer details (name, phone, date/time)
Frontend: Preorder from 'Иван Петров' visible with details
Frontend: Calls (Вызовы) tab shows staff calls with types
Frontend: Complete-all confirmation dialog works with 'Отмена' and 'Завершить все' buttons
Frontend: Client menu /menu/6E32830E (preorder table) shows preorder form
Frontend: Preorder form has name, phone, date, time fields
Frontend: Client menu /menu/697DCAA5 (regular table) does NOT show preorder form
seed_data_creation: Test preorders with TEST_ prefix were created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All preorder and complete-all features verified working. Restaurant 'Мята Спортивная' (id: aa25189d-d668-4838-915a-c5d936547f3f) has: 1) Regular table code '697DCAA5' (is_preorder=false), 2) Preorder table code '6E32830E' (is_preorder=true). Existing preorder from 'Иван Петров' was present. Orders page has 3 tabs with complete-all buttons that work via API calls. Client menu at /menu/{code} correctly shows preorder form only for preorder tables.
